api/types.purpose: Holds manually-authored Go types that fill gaps where oapi-codegen cannot generate correct types from the OpenAPI spec (e.g. oneOf/anyOf schemas). Types defined here are referenced from the OpenAPI spec via `x-go-type` so the generated Go client uses them correctly.

key_file_guides.role: Package declaration and authoritative comment explaining when and why to add types here — read before adding any new type
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding types here for anything oapi-codegen CAN handle; this package is strictly for unsupported spec constructs

anti_patterns: Adding types that oapi-codegen can generate automatically
Adding business logic or helper functions — this is a pure type definition package
Duplicating types already present in api/api.gen.go or api/v3/api.gen.go

decisions.decision: Types live in a separate package rather than inline in api.gen.go
decisions.rationale: Generated files must not be edited; a separate package allows manual type definitions to survive regeneration cycles while still being importable by generated code via x-go-type references
